headline: NVR, INC. ANNOUNCES SHARE REPURCHASE AUTHORIZATION
summary: RESTON, Va. - NVR, Inc. announces that its Board of Directors has authorized the repurchase of up to an aggregate of $750 million of its outstanding common stock. The repurchase authorization does...
